rationale: Educ. Code §11.186 governs school district college, career, and military readiness plans. It contains no provisions related to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.186. COLLEGE, CAREER, AND MILITARY READINESS PLANS.
_note: No textual relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
